headline: Assessing Whether KLA (KLAC) Looks Overvalued After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run
summary: Why KLA (KLAC) is drawing investor attention now KLA (KLAC) is back on many watchlists after its recent share price move, with the stock closing at US$2,011.39. That level naturally raises questions about how its current valuation lines up with its business performance. See our latest analysis for KLA. The latest move sits on top of a strong trend, with a 30.05% 90 day share price return and a 1 year total shareholder return of 156.55%, suggesting momentum has been building rather than...

headline: KLA vs. Applied Materials: Which Chip Equipment Stock Wins Now?
summary: AMAT gains an edge in the AI chip equipment race as broader tech exposure and stronger growth forecasts set it apart.

headline: Why KLA Corporation (KLAC) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) jumped 6.6% in the afternoon session after Micron's blowout day signaled that AI-driven chip demand is structurally undersupplied which is bullish news for the equipment makers and foundries that build the capacity.
